name: Garlic-Cumin Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Heat butter in a large, heavy nonstick skillet until bubbly.
3. Add thighs and brown on one side for about 5 minutes.
4. Turn the chicken and add garlic, then cover and cook over medium-low heat for 20-23 minutes, turning several times, until brown on both sides and opaque at the bone.
5. Sprinkle both sides with cumin, increase the heat to medium-high, and cook uncovered for 3-5 minutes, turning once, until drippings and chicken are crisp.
6. Remove the chicken to serving plates. Spoon garlic and crisp drippings over the top.
7. Sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve with lemon wedges.
